name: dev.whyknot.core
description: Shared Editor-only utilities for the WhyKnot VRChat tools: themed IMGUI styling (WhyKnot + VRCFury presets), per-package file logger with session retention, hot-reload watcher, path/mesh/avatar helpers, UIElements walkers. Installed automatically as a dependency of dev.whyknot.avatar-qol and dev.whyknot.vrcfury-qol.
